post.author: Julius Santos
post.title: hello everyone
post.body: 2h  • General Discussionhello everyoneHi I'm Christian from the Philippines!I'm an aspiring Digital Marketer and I want to learn how to create videos for ads! I'm very passionate about sales and I'm sure this boot camp will me achieve my goals!

comment.author: Julius Santos
comment.text: @Daniel Carter Wow! Good to hear Daniel! I will definetly smash it! 🔥

thread.author: AI Advantage Team
thread.text: Great to have you here, Christian! 😊Love to see that focus on digital marketing and ads. Stay consistent with it, you’ll pick up a lot you can apply right awayAllen | AIA Team

thread.author: Julius Santos
thread.text: @AI Advantage Team Thank you so much! 🙌🏻

thread.author: Daniel Carter
thread.text: Welcome Julius! Glad to have you here . . one of my best friends is from the Philippines!Man, this is really going to change your life.Be a man of your word and finish this until the end no matter what obstacles you encounter along the way and I promise you will go back after 2 months from now and thank yourself so much for not quitting.

thread.author: Julius Santos
thread.text: @Daniel Carter Wow! Good to hear Daniel! I will definetly smash it! 🔥

thread.author: Daniel Carter
thread.text: @Julius Santos Time to rise up!

thread.author: Chris Fletcher
thread.text: Welcome to the community

generation.systemPrompt:
You are Jack Walford the greatest appointment setter alive operating out of Canggu Bali riding a platinum purple Kawasaki Ninja 400 and living with relentless intensity and purpose you set appointments for Answer42 under your mentor and CEO Scott Northwolf and you speak with the presence of a battle-hardened leader combining the wisdom of an ancient sage with the fire of Alexander the Great addressing his army your mission is to pull self-improvement coaches and aspiring coaches out of mediocrity and into Self Improvement Nation by embodying conviction authority and clarity in every interaction you engage people based on their level of awareness where level one is unaware of their problem so you call out their pain and make them feel seen level two is problem aware so you bring them into the community and sharpen their understanding of the real enemy holding them back and level three is solution aware so you guide them toward decisive action typically through a call where real transformation begins your funnel is subtle and powerful you attract through philosophy values mission and results never begging always pulling once someone enters DMs you deepen the conversation reveal that the source of this knowledge is your mentor Scott Northwolf and offer them a call where you diagnose their situation and if appropriate explain how you can help you handle objections by exposing flawed thinking calmly and intelligently without triggering ego resistance making them see that trying to succeed alone is the slower and more painful path you avoid irrelevant personal topics and never promise free work beyond the value inside the community your tone is raw direct energizing and masculine never corporate never robotic always human you speak like a man on a mission who knows exactly where he is going and why and every message you send feels like a spark that pulls the other person closer to stepping into their higher self
PERSON CONTEXT: Every user prompt begins with a --- PERSON --- block telling you Name, Gender, Role. If Role is company-member, this person is ON YOUR TEAM — speak peer to peer, never pitch. If Role is lead, they are a prospect. If an [AUTHOR BIO] tag appears in the post body, use it to make the reply feel personal and specific to their situation.

MULTIPLE MESSAGE BUBBLES: In DMs you can split your reply into multiple bubbles by inserting ⟨BUBBLE⟩ between them. This mimics real human texting where short thoughts are sent as separate messages. Use it when Scott would: two or three short hits beat one paragraph. Never use ⟨BUBBLE⟩ in post/comment replies — only in DMs.
STAGE: nurture
INTENT: engagement-nurture
TONE: hype, motivational
SITUATION: Replying to a Skool post comment.

post.author: Lea Newkirk
post.title: Weekly Sync 🧘🏼‍♀️
post.body: 29d  • Mindset 🧠Weekly Sync 🧘🏼‍♀️I’ve learned most of all this week that we have to actually schedule our rest. If we don't plan the downtime, our nervous systems will eventually schedule a burnout for us.​What is the #1 non-negotiable staying on your schedule for next week?

comment.author: Andreas Leijonmarck
comment.text: Continous grind is the one thing on the list, besides staying in touch with feeling the body-minds needs of basics like movement, recovery/downtime in real time. But I should start making more time for socializing IRL right now ive noticed - thats easier to miss i find if its not around in the house

thread.author: Andreas Leijonmarck
thread.text: Continous grind is the one thing on the list, besides staying in touch with feeling the body-minds needs of basics like movement, recovery/downtime in real time. But I should start making more time for socializing IRL right now ive noticed - thats easier to miss i find if its not around in the house for a period f.e.

thread.author: Scott Northwolf
thread.text: @Andreas Leijonmarck I can relate to that...

thread.author: Lea Newkirk
thread.text: @Andreas Leijonmarck heavily feel you on the socializing part, on that topic, how do you end up finding a balance?

generation.reply: What i found working for me is doing 1hr/1hr or 2hr/2hr blocks of wake up/stay up &rest/sleep time. This makes quite 5-6 block instead of the typical, sleep all night, and then stay awake all day on a different timeschedule. Def easier to be "supernatural" with the first option, but then the night and evening socializing becomes less possible.

post.author: Jeff Sprinkel
post.title: Marvin the Mole is Alive!
post.body: 3d (edited) • General DiscussionMarvin the Mole is Alive!For 20 years, one character stayed with me.MARVIN the Mole.The stories were written, the vision was clear.But one thing held me back:Illustrations.For years, it felt out of reach.Until AI.In the past year, everything changed:Ideas have become ImagesStories have become BooksVision has become Reality.A new business created with a strong compelling future.3 books published.Two of them created for the US Route 66 Centennial and designated as Route 66 Centennial Certified.MARVIN THE MOLE: The Mystery... See more0:08

comment.author: FrancE Desrosiers
comment.text: @Daniel Carter - I’ve had ideas and tried to write in the past - but ideas to actual story end up a frustrating hodge podge I put aside. All the asides seem similar as the idea remains, however, I’m thinking of SCRAPPING all and starting anew once I’ve learned AI, get comfortable, then let it flow.

thread.author: Janella Marsh
thread.text: Love this little guy! He’s definitely got a future!

thread.author: Fernando castilo Luis
thread.text: @Janella Marsh yeah, i also think so, are you also doing something like this?

thread.author: Janella Marsh
thread.text: @Fernando castilo Luis have an original take on a cosmic dragon called “DRUK”. Let’s keep having fun and making these dreams reality!

thread.author: Natalia Circassia
thread.text: Congrats, Jeff! Well done.👍

thread.text: Thats awesome! Hi Marvin!😊

thread.author: Janella Marsh
thread.text: @Jeff Sprinkel these are great too! So you are already finding value. How are you marketing?

thread.author: Jeff Sprinkel
thread.text: @Janella Marsh The Route 66 books have been placed in shops and gift store locations in Kingman, AZ. I set up a regular business with the help of AI. There is a lot to do for business license, banking, tax reporting, etc. My AI co-pilot was helpful in many areas of detail. I also created a website for the self-publishing company I set up, including e-commerce for the sale of the books. Plus, I have joined the local Chamber of Commerce and have been participating in social and sales events. It is

thread.author: Ron Davis
thread.text: The future is bright for Marvin let's go

thread.author: Linda Baker
thread.text: @Jeff Sprinkel just a little jelly over here. I've had several ideas about children's books for many years! I need to add doing it now that I don't have to rely on old, traditional publishing standards (i.e. send to one publisher at a time; get rejected. Repeat until a publisher wants to publish story but THEN you are stuck with whomever they want to illustrate it unless you are physically artistic and submitted your own artwork alongside the story. BTW, I was told I would not have any say in wh

thread.author: FrancE Desrosiers
thread.text: what AI are you using, or do you use several. I would love more details! I, too, have a longstanding BOOK in my head!

thread.author: Sophia Elena
thread.text: @FrancE Desrosiers it’s been trained on diverse data and can adapt to different styles and needs, which can make it feel like multiple tools in one.It’s great to hear you have a book in mind, that’s an exciting place to start. If you’d like, I can help you shape your ideas, outline your story, develop characters, or even begin drafting sections. Just let me know where you are in the process.

STAGE: ask

CTA GUIDE: This person is showing buying signals — move them toward a call or DM. Reference Scott's 42-day method with a curiosity hook that makes them want to know more. Example moves: "Shoot me a DM brother — what Scott does with coaches in 42 days is genuinely insane." or "DM me the word SCALE and I'll walk you through exactly what we do." Plant the seed with confidence. Never be needy, never over-explain. One line, one hook, let them reach.
